title: iPhone Contacts Sync
excerpt:
Is there a way to sync iPhone Contacts with Monday Sales CRM? 
I don’t mean importing - I’m looking for a 2-way sync when contacts are added or updated.

posts.author: jmcmillan (Jennifer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to sync iPhone Contacts with Monday Sales CRM?

I don’t mean importing - I’m looking for a 2-way sync when contacts are added or updated.
